eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Woodward, OK; at 06:26 PM ON FEB 17, 2026 Effective until 08:26 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: At 344pm a large and destructive wildfire was burning out of control southwest of the City of Woodward spreading rapidly to the northeast. Wildfires can damage or destroy structures and can harm or kill people and animals. For your safety EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY for the Mooreland or Vici Community Center. Those between CR 41 and CR 43 and CR 197 and CR 201 should LEAVE this area NOW to avoid injury or death. Do not delay to pack belongings. The Reunification Center is setting up at the Mooreland or Vici Community Center. Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles. Roads in the area may be impacted by fire and smoke. Never drive into heavy smoke. SLOW DOWN & MOVE OVER for emergency vehicles.
